summary: The user contacted Simply AI to set up AI for their cleaning business. The agent explained Simply AI's on-site service, which includes setting up tools like ChatGPT or Copilot and providing training. The user opted for the basic package for one device. An attempt was made to schedule an appointment for April 7th at 10 am, but the booking system encountered an error. The agent informed the user that someone would follow up to finalize the appointment.
transcript:
agent: Hey! Thanks for calling Simply AI. Are you an existing customer who needs some help, or are you looking to get AI set up for your business?
user: AI set up for my business.
agent: Oh cool, what kind of business do you run? Just curious — I’m trying to get a feel for how we can make AI work best for you.
user: Um, we do, uh, service cleaning.
agent: Ah, gotcha — cleaning business, right? Yeah, a lot of folks in that space are using AI to handle scheduling, client reminders, even writing up quick reports after jobs. Sounds like it could save you a solid chunk of time. You know, like auto-reminding customers about their next clean or summarizing what was done on-site. How does that sound?
user: Uh, yeah. Um, what is it you guys do exactly?
agent: So, we send a real person — like me — right to your place, no travel hassle. We’ll set up tools like ChatGPT or Microsoft Copilot on your devices, show you how to use them for things like scheduling, messaging clients, or even drafting emails. Just make sure you’re comfortable with it before we leave. We’ve got three options — basic, pro, and premium — depending on how many devices you want covered. You know, just to get a feel, how many computers or tablets are you thinking of setting up?
user: I’m just going to be doing one.
agent: Oh, perfect — so the basic package would be a great fit then. It’s just one device, we get it all set up, show you how to use it, and you’re good to go. It’s only three hundred, and honestly, most people end up saving that back in just a few weeks just from not having to do the same tasks over and over. summary: The agent, Simi from Simply AI, introduced their service of setting up AI tools like ChatGPT for local businesses. They outlined pricing tiers: $300 for one device, $500 for up to three, and a premium $1000 package for up to ten devices including training and support. The agent offered a free consultation, but the user declined, leading to the end of the call.
